description: Terra Nil is an intricate environmental strategy game about transforming a barren wasteland into a thriving, balanced ecosystem.

v0.1.0.description:
- Added Desolate Island
- Handbook doesn't come up between tiers anymore (it kept breaking on Desolate Island)
- Goal condition changed to beating both implemented levels
- Added a couple less useless filler items
- The new game button now goes to the world map rather than the first level (preparation for eventually randomizing the start level)
- Allow leaving to world map during first play of Temperate River
- Some prep work to make adding more levels easier

Known Issues:
- The Photo Stars checks sometimes don't go through right away, place any building to get them to send
- No indication of checks sent or items received yet (except buildings in the unlocked tiers of the current level), a separate text client or tracker is highly recommended
- Level completion is not yet tracked in a persistent manner, so if you reconnect to your slot you'll need to redo any level clears you've previously achieved
- Level progress is not persistent, reconnecting to your slot means starting over, though things unlocked via Archipelago stay unlocked
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
* Added a text console to display Archipelago messages
* Make the games save system work for Archipelago sessions
* Persistent tracking of level completion
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

v0.2.0.description:
- Added 5 new levels to the randomization
  - Hill and Dale
  - Polluted Bay
  - Abandoned Quarry
  - Scorched Caldera
  - Volcanic Glacier
- Save system now saves state for each level independently, meaning you can now return to the world map without loosing progress
- Added a YAML option for how many levels you need to clear to goal (this does ***not*** exclude any levels from randomization)
- Fixed console not using the games font after scene transition

Known Issues:
- The Photo Stars checks sometimes don't go through right away, place any building to get them to send
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.1-pre.description:
* Added option to choose or randomize the starting level
* Added YAML option to select game difficulty (because the built in difficulty picker only works in River Valley)
* Fix multiple logic errors
* Fix a bug that would allow buildings to unlock incorrectly
* Rename items and locations to present better in alphabetically sorted lists (e.g. Universal Tracker)
* The archipelago console can now be hidden by pressing `F1`
v0.2.1-pre.title: v0.2.1-pre

v0.2.1-pre2.description:
* Also send lava checks if you end up with only a lava source
* Add weather control hotkeys (`F2` for sun, `Shift`+`F2` form rain/snow/etc, only works once the relevant climate goal is achieved)
* Add Universal Tracker YAMLless support
v0.2.1-pre2.title: v0.2.1-pre2

v0.2.1-pre3.description:
* Added options to control how many/which levels are included 
* Added automatic reconnect if connection to the archipelago server is lost
* Fixed a crash that would happen if trying to send check after losing connection
* Fixed a couple logic issues
* Fixed selected difficulty not being applied after restarting the game
* Fixed "Restart Phase" button not working
v0.2.1-pre3.title: v0.2.1-pre3

v0.2.1-pre4.description:
* Fixed console breaking and causing connection issues if multiple messages come in during a loading screen
* Fixed reconnect breaking when not on the main menu
* Fixed application quit handler causing a hangup when trying to exit the game in some cases
v0.2.1-pre4.title: v0.2.1-pre4
